title: Robby's General Biome Improvements
description: Improves multiple biomes by adding new mobs and structures!
body:
VERSION 2.0.0 - THE REVAMP UPDATE


-Revamped Ant and Bullet Ant textures

-Revamped Anhk Sword texture

-Revamped Ant Hills

-Revamped Pyramids


# WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?

This mod adds 2 new structures: Pyramids and Anthills.

This mod adds 2 new mobs: Bullet Ant and Ant.

This mod adds a Fang Knife (Crafted with a bullet ant fang, an ant fang, and a stick.)

This mod adds 1 biome! (Nether Ice Wastelands!)
